zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Baynard於大約1405年出生在英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普時，她的父親Robert Banyard27歲，母親Joyce Brown24歲。她於1426年與John Walker Bacon在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年8月13日在她的家鄉享年100歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Baynard于大约1405年出生在英国諾福爾可巴根斯索普时，她的父亲Robert Banyard27岁，母亲Joyce Brown24岁。她于1426年与John Walker Bacon在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1504年8月13日在她的家乡享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baynard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name Bainard, via Norman French from ancient Germanic Beinhard, perhaps from bein- ‘leg, bone’ or a supposed element bagin- ‘dispute’ + -hard ‘hard, brave’.

variants.name: Bainer
meanings: English: perhaps a late development of Baynard , with loss of the final d. The earliest record found of this name in Britain, spelled Bayner, is dated 1546.

variants.name: Bunyard
meanings: English (Kent, of Norman origin): variant of   Baynard  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Baynard was born about 1405, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, her father, Robert Banyard, was 27 and her mother, Joyce Brown, was 24. She married John Walker Bacon in 1426, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 13 August 1504, in her hometown, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Baynard est née environ 1405, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Banyard, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joyce Brown, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Walker Bacon en 1426, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 août 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Baynard um 1405 in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Banyard 27 und ihre Mutter Joyce Brown 24. Sie hat 1426 in Norfolk, England John Walker Bacon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. August 1504 im Alter von 100 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Baynard è nata il circa 1405 nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Robert Banyard, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joyce Brown, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Walker Bacon nel 1426, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 agosto 1504, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Baynardが約1405年にイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペで生まれた時，父Robert Banyardは27歳，母Joyce Brownは24歳であった。1426年にイギリスノーフォルクでJohn Walker Baconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年8月13日に故郷で100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Baynard(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Banyard(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce Brown(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1426년 영국 노르폴크에서 John Walker Bacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 8월 13일 그녀의 고향에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Baynard nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Banyard, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Brown, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Walker Bacon em 1426, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1504, em sua cidade natal, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Baynard родилась около 1405 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Banyard было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce Brown, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Walker Bacon в 1426 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 августа 1504 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Baynard nació aproximadamente 1405, en Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Banyard, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joyce Brown, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Walker Bacon en 1426, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1504, en su pueblo, a la edad de 100 años.
